label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard bridged to Sanchez on penultimate climb, detonated the break, held off a charging Roglic group by 8 seconds after his downhill-to-flat kickaway proved sufficient.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma set pace entire final climb for Roglic, exposing Evenepoel's weakness when team rode for GC not stage.
Carapaz bridging to Sanchez on penultimate climb detonated break, creating platform for solo stage win attempt.
Roglic attacked on final climb ramps when Evenepoel dropped, gaining 35 seconds despite not contesting stage win.
Lopez bridged to Roglic group for 6 bonus seconds, revealing podium ambitions through selective opportunism.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: cracked when Jumbo-Visma set pace on final climb, required Ayuso support, lost 35 seconds to Roglic revealing vulnerability
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Jumbo-Visma willing to sacrifice stage win for GC time gains, attacked when Evenepoel showed weakness
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: read penultimate climb as launch platform, timed bridge to break remnants perfectly for solo finale
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: bridged past struggling Evenepoel independently, finished with Rodriguez showing unexpected climbing form
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: opportunistically bridged for 6 bonus seconds showing selective aggression for podium positioning
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: required bike change but recovered to support Evenepoel, showing team reliability under pressure
